task.title: Replace parser stubs with bounded real PDF and EPUB text extraction
task.objective: Improve backend ingestion by replacing obvious PDF/ePUB placeholder chapters with best-effort standard-library parsers that extract real readable text from simple PDFs and EPUB archives without adding external dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Use strict TDD: add parser tests first for real EPUB chapter extraction and simple PDF literal text extraction, plus empty/invalid input errors.

EPUB parser must read the ZIP container, prefer OPF spine order when available, fall back to sorted XHTML/HTML files, strip scripts/styles/tags, decode basic HTML entities, and return chapter paragraphs with stable IDs and TOC paths.
PDF parser must not return placeholder not-implemented text; it should extract readable literal-string text from simple uncompressed text streams and return a clear error if no text can be extracted.
Keep implementation bounded: no new external dependencies, no provider interface changes, no frontend changes, no OCR provider implementation in this slice.
Run frontend validation from Hermes terminal: cd web-client && npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build. Run Go tests only if go exists; otherwise record blocked.
task.stop_condition: Stop after the parser stub replacement slice is complete, reviewed, validated, and summarized; do not implement OCR provider APIs or add third-party parser libraries.
validation: If go exists: go test ./internal/parser; otherwise record blocked
